sentence.en: He gave in and did what they told him.

parts.sentence: He gave in and did what they told him.

grammar.reason: تستخدم gave in وdid وtold لأفعال حدثت في الماضي.

wordMeanings.description: أداة سؤال أو فعل مساعد للماضي
